001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.html;
018
019import static javax.xml.stream.XMLStreamConstants.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
023import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
024import static org.apache.juneau.marshall.html.HtmlTag.*;
025
026import java.io.*;
027import java.lang.reflect.*;
028import java.util.*;
029
030import javax.xml.stream.*;
031
032import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.*;
034import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
035import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
036import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
037import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
038import org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap.*;
039import org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml.*;
040
041/**
042 * ContextSession object that lives for the duration of a single use of {@link HtmlParser}.
043 *
044 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
045 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
046 * </ul>
047 *
048 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
049 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/HtmlSupport">HTML Basics</a>
050
051 * </ul>
052 */
053@SuppressWarnings({
054   "unchecked", // Type erasure requires unchecked casts
055   "rawtypes", // Raw types necessary for generic type handling
056   "java:S110", // Inheritance depth acceptable for this class hierarchy
057   "java:S115", // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase naming convention
058})
059public class HtmlParserSession extends XmlParserSession {
060
061   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
062   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
063
064   // HTML tag name constants
065   private static final String TAG_array = "array";
066   private static final String TAG_object = "object";
067
068   /**
069    * Builder class.
070    */
071   public static class Builder extends XmlParserSession.Builder<Builder> {
072
073      private HtmlParser ctx;
074
075      /**
076       * Constructor
077       *
078       * @param ctx The context creating this session.
079       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
080       */
081      protected Builder(HtmlParser ctx) {
082         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
083         this.ctx = ctx;
084      }
085
086      @Override
087      public HtmlParserSession build() {
088         return new HtmlParserSession(this);
089      }
090
091   }
092
093   private static final Set<String> whitespaceElements = set("br", "bs", "sp", "ff");
094
095   /**
096    * Creates a new builder for this object.
097    *
098    * @param ctx The context creating this session.
099    *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
100    * @return A new builder.
101    */
102   public static Builder create(HtmlParser ctx) {
103      return new Builder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
104   }
105
106   private static String getAttribute(XmlReader r, String name, String def) {
107      for (var i = 0; i < r.getAttributeCount(); i++)
108         if (r.getAttributeLocalName(i).equals(name))
109            return r.getAttributeValue(i);
110      return def;
111   }
112
113   private static Map<String,String> getAttributes(XmlReader r) {
114      var m = new TreeMap<String,String>();
115      for (var i = 0; i < r.getAttributeCount(); i++)
116         m.put(r.getAttributeLocalName(i), r.getAttributeValue(i));
117      return m;
118   }
119
120   private static int skipWs(XmlReader r) throws XMLStreamException {
121      int event = r.getEventType();
122      while (event != START_ELEMENT && event != END_ELEMENT && event != END_DOCUMENT && r.isWhiteSpace())
123         event = r.next();
124      return event;
125   }
126
127   private final HtmlParser ctx;
128
129   /**
130    * Constructor.
131    *
132    * @param builder The builder for this object.
133    */
134   protected HtmlParserSession(Builder builder) {
135      super(builder);
136      ctx = builder.ctx;
137   }
138
139   /*
140    * Reads the next tag.  Advances past anything that's not a start or end tag.  Throws an exception if
141    *    it's not one of the expected tags.
142    * Precondition:  Must be pointing before the event we want to parse.
143    * Postcondition:  Pointing at the tag just parsed.
144    */
145   private HtmlTag nextTag(XmlReader r, HtmlTag...expected) throws ParseException, XMLStreamException {
146      int et = r.next();
147
148      while (et != START_ELEMENT && et != END_ELEMENT && et != END_DOCUMENT)
149         et = r.next();
150
151      if (et == END_DOCUMENT)
152         throw new ParseException(this, "Unexpected end of document.");
153
154      var tag = HtmlTag.forEvent(this, r);
155      if (expected.length == 0)
156         return tag;
157      for (var t : expected)
158         if (t == tag)
159            return tag;
160
161      throw new ParseException(this, "Unexpected tag: ''{0}''.  Expected one of the following: {1}", tag, expected);
162   }
163
164   /*
165    * Reads an anchor tag and converts it into a bean.
166    */
167   private <T> T parseAnchor(XmlReader r, ClassMeta<T> beanType) throws IOException, ParseException, XMLStreamException {
168      String href = r.getAttributeValue(null, "href");
169      String name = getElementText(r);
170      if (nn(beanType) && getAnnotationProvider().has(HtmlLink.class, beanType)) {
171         var uriProperty = Holder.<String>empty();
172         var nameProperty = Holder.<String>empty();
173         beanType.forEachAnnotation(HtmlLink.class, x -> ine(x.uriProperty()), x -> uriProperty.set(x.uriProperty()));
174         beanType.forEachAnnotation(HtmlLink.class, x -> ine(x.nameProperty()), x -> nameProperty.set(x.nameProperty()));
175         BeanMap<T> m = newBeanMap(beanType.inner());
176         m.put(uriProperty.orElse(""), href);
177         m.put(nameProperty.orElse(""), name);
178         return m.getBean();
179      }
180      return convertToType(href, beanType);
181   }
182
183   /*
184    * Reads anything starting at the current event.
185    * <p>
186    * Precondition:  Must be pointing at outer START_ELEMENT.
187    * Postcondition:  Pointing at outer END_ELEMENT.
188    */
189   @SuppressWarnings({
190      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for HTML parsing with type detection
191   })
192   private <T> T parseAnything(ClassMeta<T> eType, XmlReader r, Object outer, boolean isRoot, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException, XMLStreamException {
193
194      if (eType == null)
195         eType = (ClassMeta<T>)object();
196      var swap = (ObjectSwap<T,Object>)eType.getSwap(this);
197      var builder = (BuilderSwap<T,Object>)eType.getBuilderSwap(this);
198      ClassMeta<?> sType = null;
199      if (nn(builder))
200         sType = builder.getBuilderClassMeta(this);
201      else if (nn(swap))
202         sType = swap.getSwapClassMeta(this);
203      else
204         sType = eType;
205
206      if (sType.isOptional())
207         return (T)o(parseAnything(eType.getElementType(), r, outer, isRoot, pMeta));
208
209      setCurrentClass(sType);
210
211      int event = r.getEventType();
212      if (event != START_ELEMENT)
213         throw new ParseException(this, "parseAnything must be called on outer start element.");
214
215      if (! isRoot)
216         event = r.next();
217      var isEmpty = (event == END_ELEMENT);
218
219      // Skip until we find a start element, end document, or non-empty text.
220      if (! isEmpty)
221         event = skipWs(r);
222
223      if (event == END_DOCUMENT)
224         throw new ParseException(this, "Unexpected end of stream in parseAnything for type ''{0}''", eType);
225
226      // Handle @Html(asXml=true) beans.
227      var hcm = getHtmlClassMeta(sType);
228      if (hcm.getFormat() == HtmlFormat.XML)
229         return super.parseAnything(eType, null, r, outer, false, pMeta);
230
231      Object o = null;
232
233      var isValid = true;
234      var tag = (event == CHARACTERS ? null : HtmlTag.forString(r.getName().getLocalPart(), false));
235
236      // If it's not a known tag, then parse it as XML.
237      // Allows us to parse stuff like "<div/>" into HTML5 beans.
238      if (tag == null && event != CHARACTERS)
239         return super.parseAnything(eType, null, r, outer, false, pMeta);
240
241      if (tag == HTML)
242         tag = skipToData(r);
243
244      if (isEmpty) {
245         o = "";
246      } else if (tag == null || tag.isOneOf(BR, BS, FF, SP)) {
247         String text = parseText(r);
248         if (sType.isObject() || sType.isCharSequence())
249            o = text;
250         else if (sType.isChar())
251            o = parseCharacter(text);
252         else if (sType.isNumber())
253            o = parseNumber(text, (Class<? extends Number>)eType.inner());
254         else if (sType.isBoolean())
255            o = Boolean.parseBoolean(text);
256         else if (sType.isDate())
257            o = parseDate(text, sType);
258         else if (sType.isCalendar())
259            o = parseCalendar(text, sType);
260         else if (sType.isTemporal())
261            o = parseTemporal(text, sType);
262         else if (sType.isDuration())
263            o = parseDuration(text);
264         else if (sType.isPeriod())
265            o = parsePeriod(text);
266         else if (sType.canCreateNewInstanceFromString(outer))
267            o = sType.newInstanceFromString(outer, text);
268         else
269            isValid = false;
270
271      } else if (tag == STRING || (tag == A && nn(pMeta) && nn(getHtmlBeanPropertyMeta(pMeta).getLink()))) {
272         String text = getElementText(r);
273         if (sType.isObject() || sType.isCharSequence())
274            o = text;
275         else if (sType.isChar())
276            o = parseCharacter(text);
277         else if (sType.isDate())
278            o = parseDate(text, sType);
279         else if (sType.isCalendar())
280            o = parseCalendar(text, sType);
281         else if (sType.isTemporal())
282            o = parseTemporal(text, sType);
283         else if (sType.isDuration())
284            o = parseDuration(text);
285         else if (sType.isPeriod())
286            o = parsePeriod(text);
287         else if (sType.canCreateNewInstanceFromString(outer))
288            o = sType.newInstanceFromString(outer, text);
289         else
290            isValid = false;
291         skipTag(r, tag == STRING ? X_STRING : X_A);
292
293      } else if (tag == NUMBER) {
294         String text = getElementText(r);
295         if (sType.isObject())
296            o = parseNumber(text, Number.class);
297         else if (sType.isNumber())
298            o = parseNumber(text, (Class<? extends Number>)sType.inner());
299         else
300            isValid = false;
301         skipTag(r, X_NUMBER);
302
303      } else if (tag == BOOLEAN) {
304         String text = getElementText(r);
305         if (sType.isObject() || sType.isBoolean())
306            o = Boolean.parseBoolean(text);
307         else
308            isValid = false;
309         skipTag(r, X_BOOLEAN);
310
311      } else if (tag == P) {
312         String text = getElementText(r);
313         if (! "No Results".equals(text))
314            isValid = false;
315         skipTag(r, X_P);
316
317      } else if (tag == NULL) {
318         skipTag(r, NULL);
319         skipTag(r, X_NULL);
320
321      } else if (tag == A) {
322         o = parseAnchor(r, swap == null ? eType : null);
323         skipTag(r, X_A);
324
325      } else if (tag == TABLE) {
326
327         String typeName = getAttribute(r, getBeanTypePropertyName(eType), TAG_object);
328         ClassMeta cm = getClassMeta(typeName, pMeta, eType);
329
330         if (nn(cm)) {
331            sType = eType = cm;
332            typeName = sType.isCollectionOrArray() ? TAG_array : TAG_object;
333         } else if (! TAG_array.equals(typeName)) {
334            // Type name could be a subtype name.
335            typeName = sType.isCollectionOrArray() ? TAG_array : TAG_object;
336         }
337
338         if (typeName.equals(TAG_object)) {
339            if (sType.isObject()) {
340               o = parseIntoMap(r, newGenericMap(sType), sType.getKeyType(), sType.getValueType(), pMeta);
341            } else if (nn(builder)) {
342               BeanMap m = toBeanMap(builder.create(this, eType));
343               o = builder.build(this, parseIntoBean(r, m).getBean(), eType);
344            } else if (sType.canCreateNewBean(outer)) {
345               BeanMap m = newBeanMap(outer, sType.inner());
346               o = parseIntoBean(r, m).getBean();
347            } else if (sType.isMap()) {
348               o = parseIntoMap(r, (Map)(sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? sType.newInstance(outer) : newGenericMap(sType)), sType.getKeyType(), sType.getValueType(), pMeta);
349            } else if (nn(sType.getProxyInvocationHandler())) {
350               BeanMap m = newBeanMap(outer, sType.inner());
351               o = parseIntoBean(r, m).getBean();
352            } else {
353               isValid = false;
354            }
355            skipTag(r, X_TABLE);
356
357         } else if (typeName.equals(TAG_array)) {
358            if (sType.isObject())
359               o = parseTableIntoCollection(r, (Collection)newGenericList(), sType, pMeta);
360            else if (sType.isCollection())
361               o = parseTableIntoCollection(r, (Collection)(sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? sType.newInstance(outer) : newGenericList()), sType, pMeta);
362            else if (sType.isArray() || sType.isArgs()) {
363               var l = (ArrayList)parseTableIntoCollection(r, list(), sType, pMeta);
364               o = toArray(sType, l);
365            } else
366               isValid = false;
367            skipTag(r, X_TABLE);
368
369         } else {
370            isValid = false;
371         }
372
373      } else if (tag == UL) {
374         String typeName = getAttribute(r, getBeanTypePropertyName(eType), TAG_array);
375         ClassMeta cm = getClassMeta(typeName, pMeta, eType);
376         if (nn(cm))
377            sType = eType = cm;
378
379         if (sType.isObject())
380            o = parseIntoCollection(r, newGenericList(), sType, pMeta);
381         else if (sType.isCollection() || sType.isObject())
382            o = parseIntoCollection(r, (Collection)(sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? sType.newInstance(outer) : newGenericList()), sType, pMeta);
383         else if (sType.isArray() || sType.isArgs())
384            o = toArray(sType, parseIntoCollection(r, list(), sType, pMeta));
385         else
386            isValid = false;
387         skipTag(r, X_UL);
388
389      }
390
391      if (! isValid)
392         throw new ParseException(this, "Unexpected tag ''{0}'' for type ''{1}''", tag, eType);
393
394      if (nn(swap) && nn(o))
395         o = unswap(swap, o, eType);
396
397      if (nn(outer))
398         setParent(eType, o, outer);
399
400      skipWs(r);
401      return (T)o;
402   }
403
404   /*
405    * Reads contents of <table> element.
406    * Precondition:  Must be pointing at event following <table> event.
407    * Postcondition:  Pointing at next START_ELEMENT or END_DOCUMENT event.
408    */
409   @SuppressWarnings({
410      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for HTML bean parsing
411   })
412   private <T> BeanMap<T> parseIntoBean(XmlReader r, BeanMap<T> m) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException, XMLStreamException {
413      while (true) {
414         HtmlTag tag = nextTag(r, TR, X_TABLE);
415         if (tag == X_TABLE)
416            break;
417         tag = nextTag(r, TD, TH);
418         // Skip over the column headers.
419         if (tag == TH) {
420            skipTag(r);
421            r.nextTag();
422            skipTag(r);
423         } else {
424            String key = getElementText(r);
425            nextTag(r, TD);
426            var pMeta = m.getPropertyMeta(key);
427            if (pMeta == null) {
428               onUnknownProperty(key, m, parseAnything(object(), r, null, false, null));
429            } else {
430               var cm = (ClassMeta<?>) pMeta.getBeanInfo();
431               Object value = parseAnything(cm, r, m.getBean(false), false, pMeta);
432               setName(cm, value, key);
433               try {
434                  pMeta.set(m, key, value);
435               } catch (BeanRuntimeException e) {
436                  onBeanSetterException(pMeta, e);
437                  throw e;
438               }
439            }
440         }
441         HtmlTag t = nextTag(r, X_TD, X_TR);
442         if (t == X_TD)
443            nextTag(r, X_TR);
444      }
445      return m;
446   }
447
448   /*
449    * Reads contents of <ul> element.
450    * Precondition:  Must be pointing at event following <ul> event.
451    * Postcondition:  Pointing at next START_ELEMENT or END_DOCUMENT event.
452    */
453   @SuppressWarnings({
454      "java:S2177" // Intentional: HtmlParserSession provides its own private parseIntoCollection() with HTML-specific logic
455   })
456   private <E> Collection<E> parseIntoCollection(XmlReader r, Collection<E> l, ClassMeta<?> type, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException, XMLStreamException {
457      int argIndex = 0;
458      while (true) {
459         HtmlTag tag = nextTag(r, LI, X_UL, X_LI);
460         if (tag == X_LI)
461            tag = nextTag(r, LI, X_UL, X_LI);
462         if (tag == X_UL)
463            break;
464         var elementType = type.isArgs() ? type.getArg(argIndex++) : type.getElementType();
465         l.add((E)parseAnything(elementType, r, l, false, pMeta));
466      }
467      return l;
468   }
469
470   /*
471    * Reads contents of <table> element.
472    * Precondition:  Must be pointing at <table> event.
473    * Postcondition:  Pointing at next START_ELEMENT or END_DOCUMENT event.
474    */
475   @SuppressWarnings({
476      "java:S2177" // Intentional: HtmlParserSession provides its own private parseIntoMap() with HTML-specific logic
477   })
478   private <K,V> Map<K,V> parseIntoMap(XmlReader r, Map<K,V> m, ClassMeta<K> keyType, ClassMeta<V> valueType, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta)
479      throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException, XMLStreamException {
480      while (true) {
481         HtmlTag tag = nextTag(r, TR, X_TABLE);
482         if (tag == X_TABLE)
483            break;
484         tag = nextTag(r, TD, TH);
485         // Skip over the column headers.
486         if (tag == TH) {
487            skipTag(r);
488            r.nextTag();
489            skipTag(r);
490         } else {
491            K key = parseAnything(keyType, r, m, false, pMeta);
492            nextTag(r, TD);
493            V value = parseAnything(valueType, r, m, false, pMeta);
494            setName(valueType, value, key);
495            m.put(key, value);
496         }
497         tag = nextTag(r, X_TD, X_TR);
498         if (tag == X_TD)
499            nextTag(r, X_TR);
500      }
501
502      return m;
503   }
504
505   /*
506    * Reads contents of <ul> element.
507    * Precondition:  Must be pointing at event following <ul> event.
508    * Postcondition:  Pointing at next START_ELEMENT or END_DOCUMENT event.
509    */
510   @SuppressWarnings({
511      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for HTML table parsing into collection
512   })
513   private <E> Collection<E> parseTableIntoCollection(XmlReader r, Collection<E> l, ClassMeta<E> type, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta)
514      throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException, XMLStreamException {
515
516      nextTag(r, TR);
517      List<String> keys = list();
518      HtmlTag tag;
519      while (true) {
520         tag = nextTag(r, TH, X_TR);
521         if (tag == X_TR)
522            break;
523         keys.add(getElementText(r));
524      }
525
526      int argIndex = 0;
527
528      while (true) {
529         r.nextTag();
530         tag = HtmlTag.forEvent(this, r);
531         if (tag == X_TABLE)
532            break;
533
534         ClassMeta elementType = null;
535         String beanType = getAttribute(r, getBeanTypePropertyName(type), null);
536         if (nn(beanType))
537            elementType = getClassMeta(beanType, pMeta, null);
538         if (elementType == null)
539            elementType = type.isArgs() ? type.getArg(argIndex++) : type.getElementType();
540         if (elementType == null)
541            elementType = object();
542
543         BuilderSwap<E,Object> builder = elementType.getBuilderSwap(this);
544
545         if (nn(builder) || elementType.canCreateNewBean(l)) {
546            // @formatter:off
547            BeanMap m =
548               nn(builder)
549               ? toBeanMap(builder.create(this, elementType))
550               : newBeanMap(l, elementType.inner())
551            ;
552            // @formatter:on
553            for (var key : keys) {
554               tag = nextTag(r, X_TD, TD, NULL);
555               if (tag == X_TD)
556                  tag = nextTag(r, TD, NULL);
557               if (tag == NULL) {
558                  m = null;
559                  nextTag(r, X_NULL);
560                  break;
561               }
562               BeanMapEntry e = m.getProperty(key);
563               if (e == null) {
564                  parseAnything(object(), r, l, false, null);
565               } else {
566                  BeanPropertyMeta bpm = e.getMeta();
567                  var cm = (ClassMeta<?>) bpm.getBeanInfo();
568                  Object value = parseAnything(cm, r, m.getBean(false), false, bpm);
569                  setName(cm, value, key);
570                  bpm.set(m, key, value);
571               }
572            }
573            E element;
574            if (m == null) {
575               element = null;
576            } else if (nn(builder)) {
577               element = builder.build(this, m.getBean(), elementType);
578            } else {
579               element = (E)m.getBean();
580            }
581            l.add(element);
582         } else {
583            String c = getAttributes(r).get(getBeanTypePropertyName(type.getElementType()));
584            var m = (Map)(elementType.isMap() && elementType.canCreateNewInstance(l) ? elementType.newInstance(l) : newGenericMap(elementType));
585            for (var key : keys) {
586               tag = nextTag(r, TD, NULL);
587               if (tag == NULL) {
588                  m = null;
589                  nextTag(r, X_NULL);
590                  break;
591               }
592               if (nn(m)) {
593                  var kt = elementType.getKeyType();
594                  var vt = elementType.getValueType();
595                  Object value = parseAnything(vt, r, l, false, pMeta);
596                  setName(vt, value, key);
597                  m.put(convertToType(key, kt), value);
598               }
599            }
600            if (nn(m) && nn(c)) {
601               var m2 = (m instanceof MarshalledMap mm ? mm : new JsonMap(m).session(this));
602               m2.put(getBeanTypePropertyName(type.getElementType()), c);
603               l.add((E)cast(m2, pMeta, elementType));
604            } else {
605               if (m instanceof MarshalledMap m2)
606                  l.add((E)convertToType(m2, elementType));
607               else
608                  l.add((E)m);
609            }
610         }
611         nextTag(r, X_TR);
612      }
613      return l;
614   }
615
616   /*
617    * Skips over the current element and advances to the next element.
618    * <p>
619    * Precondition:  Pointing to opening tag.
620    * Postcondition:  Pointing to next opening tag.
621    *
622    * @param r The stream being read from.
623    * @throws XMLStreamException
624    */
625   private void skipTag(XmlReader r) throws ParseException, XMLStreamException {
626      int et = r.getEventType();
627
628      if (et != START_ELEMENT)
629         throw new ParseException(this, "skipToNextTag() call on invalid event ''{0}''.  Must only be called on START_ELEMENT events.", XmlUtils.toReadableEvent(r));
630
631      String n = r.getLocalName();
632
633      int depth = 0;
634      while (true) {
635         et = r.next();
636         if (et == START_ELEMENT) {
637            String n2 = r.getLocalName();
638            if (n.equals(n2))
639               depth++;
640         } else if (et == END_ELEMENT) {
641            String n2 = r.getLocalName();
642            if (n.equals(n2))
643               depth--;
644            if (depth < 0)
645               return;
646         }
647      }
648   }
649
650   private void skipTag(XmlReader r, HtmlTag...expected) throws ParseException, XMLStreamException {
651      var tag = HtmlTag.forEvent(this, r);
652      if (tag.isOneOf(expected))
653         r.next();
654      else
655         throw new ParseException(this, "Unexpected tag: ''{0}''.  Expected one of the following: {1}", tag, expected);
656   }
657
658   /*
659    * For parsing output from HtmlDocSerializer, this skips over the head, title, and links.
660    */
661   private HtmlTag skipToData(XmlReader r) throws ParseException, XMLStreamException {
662      while (true) {
663         var event = r.next();
664         if (event == START_ELEMENT && "div".equals(r.getLocalName()) && "data".equals(r.getAttributeValue(null, "id"))) {
665            r.nextTag();
666            event = r.getEventType();
667            var isEmpty = (event == END_ELEMENT);
668            // Skip until we find a start element, end document, or non-empty text.
669            if (! isEmpty)
670               event = skipWs(r);
671            if (event == END_DOCUMENT)
672               throw new ParseException(this, "Unexpected end of stream looking for data.");
673            return (event == CHARACTERS ? null : HtmlTag.forString(r.getName().getLocalPart(), false));
674         }
675      }
676   }
677
678   @Override /* Overridden from ParserSession */
679   protected <T> T doParse(ParserPipe pipe, ClassMeta<T> type) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
680      try {
681         return parseAnything(type, getXmlReader(pipe), getOuter(), true, null);
682      } catch (XMLStreamException e) {
683         throw new ParseException(e);
684      }
685   }
686
687   @Override /* Overridden from ReaderParserSession */
688   protected <E> Collection<E> doParseIntoCollection(ParserPipe pipe, Collection<E> c, Type elementType) throws Exception {
689      return parseIntoCollection(getXmlReader(pipe), c, getClassMeta(elementType), null);
690   }
691
692   @Override /* Overridden from ReaderParserSession */
693   protected <K,V> Map<K,V> doParseIntoMap(ParserPipe pipe, Map<K,V> m, Type keyType, Type valueType) throws Exception {
694      return parseIntoMap(getXmlReader(pipe), m, (ClassMeta<K>)getClassMeta(keyType), (ClassMeta<V>)getClassMeta(valueType), null);
695   }
696
697   /**
698    * Identical to {@link #parseText(XmlReader)} except assumes the current event is the opening tag.
699    *
700    * <p>
701    * Precondition:  Pointing to opening tag.
702    * Postcondition:  Pointing to closing tag.
703    *
704    * @param r The stream being read from.
705    * @return The parsed string.
706    * @throws XMLStreamException Thrown by underlying XML stream.
707    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
708    */
709   @Override /* Overridden from XmlParserSession */
710   protected String getElementText(XmlReader r) throws IOException, XMLStreamException, ParseException {
711      r.next();
712      return parseText(r);
713   }
714
715   /**
716    * Returns the language-specific metadata on the specified bean property.
717    *
718    * @param bpm The bean property to return the metadata on.
719    * @return The metadata.
720    */
721   protected HtmlBeanPropertyMeta getHtmlBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm) {
722      return ctx.getHtmlBeanPropertyMeta(bpm);
723   }
724
725   /**
726    * Returns the language-specific metadata on the specified class.
727    *
728    * @param cm The class to return the metadata on.
729    * @return The metadata.
730    */
731   protected HtmlClassMeta getHtmlClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
732      return ctx.getHtmlClassMeta(cm);
733   }
734
735   @Override /* Overridden from XmlParserSession */
736   protected boolean isWhitespaceElement(XmlReader r) {
737      String s = r.getLocalName();
738      return whitespaceElements.contains(s);
739   }
740
741   /**
742    * Parses CHARACTERS data.
743    *
744    * <p>
745    * Precondition:  Pointing to event immediately following opening tag.
746    * Postcondition:  Pointing to closing tag.
747    *
748    * @param r The stream being read from.
749    * @return The parsed string.
750    * @throws XMLStreamException Thrown by underlying XML stream.
751    */
752   @Override /* Overridden from XmlParserSession */
753   @SuppressWarnings({
754      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for HTML text parsing with whitespace handling
755   })
756   protected String parseText(XmlReader r) throws IOException, ParseException, XMLStreamException {
757
758      StringBuilder sb = getStringBuilder();
759
760      int et = r.getEventType();
761      if (et == END_ELEMENT)
762         return "";
763
764      int depth = 0;
765
766      String characters = null;
767
768      while (true) {
769         if (et == START_ELEMENT) {
770            if (nn(characters)) {
771               if (sb.isEmpty())
772                  characters = trimStart(characters);
773               sb.append(characters);
774               characters = null;
775            }
776            var tag = HtmlTag.forEvent(this, r);
777            if (tag == BR) {
778               sb.append('\n');
779               r.nextTag();
780            } else if (tag == BS) {
781               sb.append('\b');
782               r.nextTag();
783            } else if (tag == SP) {
784               et = r.next();
785               if (et == CHARACTERS) {
786                  String s = r.getText();
787                  if (ine(s)) {
788                     var c = r.getText().charAt(0);
789                     if (c == '\u2003')
790                        c = '\t';
791                     sb.append(c);
792                  }
793                  r.nextTag();
794               }
795            } else if (tag == FF) {
796               sb.append('\f');
797               r.nextTag();
798            } else if (tag.isOneOf(STRING, NUMBER, BOOLEAN)) {
799               et = r.next();
800               if (et == CHARACTERS) {
801                  sb.append(r.getText());
802                  r.nextTag();
803               }
804            } else {
805               sb.append('<').append(r.getLocalName());
806               for (var i = 0; i < r.getAttributeCount(); i++)
807                  sb.append(' ').append(r.getAttributeName(i)).append('=').append('\'').append(r.getAttributeValue(i)).append('\'');
808               sb.append('>');
809               depth++;
810            }
811         } else if (et == END_ELEMENT) {
812            if (nn(characters)) {
813               if (sb.isEmpty())
814                  characters = trimStart(characters);
815               if (depth == 0)
816                  characters = trimEnd(characters);
817               sb.append(characters);
818               characters = null;
819            }
820            if (depth == 0)
821               break;
822            sb.append('<').append(r.getLocalName()).append('>');
823            depth--;
824         } else if (et == CHARACTERS) {
825            characters = r.getText();
826         }
827         et = r.next();
828      }
829
830      String s = trim(sb.toString());
831      returnStringBuilder(sb);
832      return s;
833   }
834
835   @Override /* Overridden from XmlParserSession */
836   protected String parseWhitespaceElement(XmlReader r) throws IOException, ParseException, XMLStreamException {
837
838      var tag = HtmlTag.forEvent(this, r);
839      int et = r.next();
840      if (tag == BR) {
841         return "\n";
842      } else if (tag == BS) {
843         return "\b";
844      } else if (tag == FF) {
845         return "\f";
846      } else if (tag == SP) {
847         if (et == CHARACTERS) {
848            String s = r.getText();
849            if (s.charAt(0) == '\u2003')
850               s = "\t";
851            r.next();
852            return decodeString(s);
853         }
854         return "";
855      } else {
856         throw new ParseException(this, "Invalid tag found in parseWhitespaceElement(): ''{0}''", tag);
857      }
858   }
859}
